# Sweepsless in Seattle

> Professional house cleaning for Woodinville, Kirkland, Bellevue, and the greater Eastside. Non-toxic, plant-based products. No contracts. We promise to sweep you off your feet.

## Services

- [The "Destiny" Routine — Restorative Clean](https://sweepslessinseattle.com/services/destiny): Our recurring cleaning service removes the day-to-day chaos with non-toxic, plant-based care. Weekly, biweekly, or monthly visits covering kitchens, baths, floors, dusting, and general tidying.
- [The Million Tiny Little Things — Deep Clean](https://sweepslessinseattle.com/services/million-things): Every tiny detail added up until your home feels like magic. Hand-wiping blind slats, steaming window tracks, vacuuming behind heavy furniture, inside appliances, and detailed grout scrubbing.
- [The "Observation Deck" — Candlelight & Cabernet / Date Night In](https://sweepslessinseattle.com/services/observation-deck): A full restorative clean plus the atmosphere for a romantic evening at home. Includes a premium scented candle, artisanal snack spread, fresh bouquet, and wine pairing.

## Why Choose Us

- No contracts — book on your terms, cancel anytime
- Non-toxic, plant-based cleaning products
- Vetted, in-house teams — background-checked, insured, consistently trained
- Flexible scheduling — easy rescheduling with clear communication
- Satisfaction promise — if something misses the mark, we return to fix it

## About

Sweepsless in Seattle is a locally owned cleaning company based in Woodinville, WA. Founded to fix the frustrations of rigid contracts, inconsistent teams, and toxic products. Our teams earn fair wages, work reasonable hours, and use non-toxic, plant-based products for every clean.

## Service Area

Kirkland, Mill Creek, Redmond, Bellevue, Sammamish, Edmonds, Lynnwood, Kenmore, Bothell, Woodinville, Medina, and Mercer Island in Washington state.
